title: AI Model Hierarchy Configurator

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Hierarchy Configurator

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='140' y='140' width='120' height='50' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/>
  <rect x='140' y='200' width='120' height='50' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/>
  <rect x='20' y='60' width='100' height='50' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <rect x='20' y='120' width='100' height='50' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <text x='25' y='85' fill='#fff' font-size='18'>Layers</text>
  <text x='25' y='145' fill='#fff' font-size='18'>Connections</text>
  <rect x='310' y='10' width='50' height='50' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <text x='315' y='45' fill='#fff' font-size='18'>Tokens</text>
  <g>
    <path d='M 120,20 L 130,20 Q 130,10 140,10 Z' fill='#C06C88' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
    <path d='M 140,20 L 150,20 Q 150,10 160,10 Z' fill='#C06C88' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'/>
  </g>
  <g>
    <path d='M 220,20 L 230,20 Q 230,10 240,10 Z' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/>
    <path d='M 240,20 L 250,20 Q 250,10 260,10 Z' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/>
  </g>
  <path d='M 10,10 L 10,280 Q 20,280 20,270 Q 30,270 30,260 Q 40,260 40,250 Q 50,250 50,240 Q 60,240 60,230 Q 70,230 70,220 Q 80,220 80,210 Q 90,210 90,200 Q 100,200 100,190 Q 110,190 110,180 Q 120,180 120,170 Q 130,170 130,160 Q 140,160 140,150 Q 150,150 150,140 Q 160,140 160,130 Q 170,130 170,120 Q 180,120 180,110 Q 190,110 190,100 Q 200,100 200,90 Q 210,90 210,80 Q 220,80 220,70 Q 230,70 230,60 Q 240,60 240,50 Q 250,50 250,40 Q 260,40 260,30 Q 270,30 270,20 Q 280,20 280,10 Z' fill='#411C56' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Configure model hierarchy using sliders, dropdowns, and real-time updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Hierarchy Configurator

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
